case_title: CACH, LLC VS. ELIZABETH L. BAMBA ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BAMBA, ELIZABETH L. DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-31-2020
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200014225) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5
DECLARATION RE 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 200014225) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC
DECLARATION OF NON MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 200014225) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $294.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 200014225) AS TO DEFENDANT BAMBA, ELIZABETH L.
DECLARATION RE WAIVER (TRANSACTION ID # 200014225) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC
DECLARATION CCP 585 (TRANSACTION ID # 200014225) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200011754), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC SERVED JUN-13-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BAMBA, ELIZABETH L.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAMBA, ELIZABETH L. $3,016.27 PRINCIPAL, $294.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,310.77, SEE SCANNED DOC
